socketedItems.secDescrText: Jump through the air, damaging and knocking back enemies with your weapon where you land. Enemies you would land on are pushed out of the way. Requires an Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Sword or Staff.
explicitMods: 39% increased Stun Duration against Enemies that are on Full Life
Damaging Hits always Stun Enemies that are on Full Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

implicitMods: 4% increased Critical Strike Chance for Spells while Dual Wielding

socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

name: Voice of the Storm
explicitMods: Lightning Damage with Non-Critical Strikes is Lucky
flavourText: When she of many mouths spoke,
we bowed in awe and were crushed.

name: The Gull
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
75% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
50% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the quality of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which significantly lowers your maximum Energy Shield to transform your equipped weapons into Swords formed from that energy. Casting the spell again removes the buff. Requires a Non-Bow weapon. This skill cannot be triggered.

Energy Blades have minimum Lightning Damage equal to 2% of Energy Shield, plus 13
Energy Blades have maximum Lightning Damage equal to 40% of Energy Shield, plus 250
Two Handed Energy Blades have 70% more Lightning Damage
Buff grants 50% less Maximum Energy Shield
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Adds a buff that deals Physical Damage over time, while increasing Attack Speed and Life Leech. Killing an enemy while this buff is active refreshes the buff duration, and can grant a Frenzy Charge.

You take 4% of your Maximum Life per second as Physical Damage
You take 4% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Physical Damage

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Echoing Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

Cursed enemies grant 50 Life when Hit by Attacks
Cursed enemies grant 25 Mana when Hit by Attacks

flavourText: "She fled from the prison of her birth, drawn by the breaking
of that great Silence. At that moment, the universe was changed,
and walls that were once impenetrable became brittle.
A fortress became a shell, and she alone escaped."
